name: Calendar AI Scheduling Assistant
description: Fetches Google Calendar events, uses Claude AI to help with scheduling decisions, suggests meeting preparation tasks, identifies optimal time slots, and posts actionable recommendations to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI agent : Google calendar assistant using OpenAI

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting suggestions

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post scheduling suggestions

schedulingRequest.description: Optional scheduling request (e.g. 'Find time for a 1-hour team sync this week')

steps.name: Fetch calendar events for this and next week
Build Claude prompt for scheduling assistant
Build Slack Block Kit scheduling assistant
